title: Folon Chapel in Saint Paul de Vence | Mas du Chanoine
description: Folon Chapel in Saint Paul de Vence: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.

breadcrumb.label: Folon Chapel in Saint Paul de Vence

paragraphs: The chapel of the white penitents, a sober building in white stones with a triangle bell tower. The Belgian artist Jean-Michel Folon decorated the interior: frescoes, mosaic with color gradations, stained glass windows and sculptures for the main altar. The inhabitants of Saint Paul find their village in the mosaic of the nave.
eventName: Folon Chapel in Saint Paul de Vence
